title: The Human Element: Using Research And Psychology To Elevate Data Storytelling
summary: effective data storytelling isn’t a black box. by integrating ux research & psychology, you can craft more impactful and persuasive narratives. victor yocco and angelica lo duca outline a five-step framework that provides a roadmap for creating data stories that resonate with audiences on both a cognitive and emotional level.

summary:
this blog site has been archived. go to react.dev/blog to see the recent posts.


today we are releasing react 16.13.0. it contains bugfixes and new deprecation warnings to help prepare for a future major release.
new warnings 
warnings for some updates during render 
a react component should not cause side effects in other components during rendering.

title: React Labs: What We've Been Working On – June 2022
summary:
this blog site has been archived. go to react.dev/blog to see the recent posts.


react 18 was years in the making, and with it brought valuable lessons for the react team. its release was the result of many years of research and exploring many paths. some of those paths were successful; many more were dead-ends that led to new insights. one lesson we’ve learned is that it’s frustrating for the community to wait for new features without having insight into these paths that we’re exploring.
